
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Zoho Solutions Partner | Custom CRM, Creator &amp; Automation</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Custom Zoho solutions: Creator apps, CRM, Books, Inventory, Analytics and Flow integrations that streamline operations and accelerate growth." />
  <meta property="og:title" content="Zoho Solutions Partner | Custom CRM, Creator &amp; Automation" />
  <meta property="og:description" content="Custom Zoho solutions that streamline operations, automate workflows, and accelerate growth." />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       DESIGN TOKENS — edit here to retheme the site
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <style>
    :root {
      --primary:        #4a3bbf;
      --primary-light:  #7c5fe6;
      --primary-glow:   rgba(124,95,230,0.15);
      --accent:         #f5a623;
      --bg:             #f9f9fc;
      --bg-alt:         #f2effc;
      --bg-card:        #ffffff;
      --text:           #18192a;
      --text-muted:     #6b6a85;
      --text-light:     #9e9ab8;
      --border:         #e8e4f8;
      --border-hover:   #c5bef5;
      --radius-sm:      8px;
      --radius-md:      12px;
      --radius-lg:      16px;
      --radius-xl:      20px;
      --shadow-card:    0 2px 16px rgba(74,59,191,0.08);
      --shadow-lg:      0 8px 40px rgba(74,59,191,0.18);
      --font-display:   'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      --font-body:      'Inter', sans-serif;
      --max-w:          1100px;
    }

    /* ── Reset ── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { font-family: var(--font-body); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); line-height: 1.65; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
    img  { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
    a    { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }
    ul   { list-style: none; }

    /* ── Typography ── */
    h1,h2,h3,h4 { font-family: var(--font-display); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(32px, 5.5vw, 62px); font-weight: 700; }
    h2 { font-size: clamp(24px, 3.5vw, 42px); font-weight: 700; }
    h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; }

    /* ── Utilities ── */
    .container     { max-width: var(--max-w); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
    .section       { padding: 72px 0; }
    .section-alt   { background: var(--bg-alt); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .label         { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px; display: block; }
    .text-gradient { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light)); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; }
    .text-muted    { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .mt-4  { margin-top: 16px; }
    .mt-6  { margin-top: 24px; }
    .mt-8  { margin-top: 32px; }
    .mt-10 { margin-top: 40px; }
    .mb-10 { margin-bottom: 40px; }

    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .btn {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-body); font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;
      padding: 13px 22px; border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity .2s, transform .15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn:hover   { opacity: .9; transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .btn:active  { transform: translateY(0); }
    .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light)); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(74,59,191,0.3); }
    .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--primary); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-hover); }
    .btn-sm      { padding: 9px 16px; font-size: 13px; }

    /* ── Cards ── */
    .card {
      background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 24px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
      transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s;
    }
    .card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transform: translateY(-3px); }

    /* ── Grid helpers ── */
    .grid { display: grid; gap: 18px; }
    .grid-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); }
    .grid-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); }
    .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); }
    .grid-5 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(155px, 1fr)); }
    .grid-7 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(128px, 1fr)); }

    /* ── Zoho logo icon box ── */
    .zoho-logo-box {
      width: 100%; max-width: 160px; height: 52px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      border: 1px solid var(--border); background: #fff;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .zoho-logo-box img {
      max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;
      width: auto; height: auto;
      object-fit: contain; display: block;
    }

    /* ── Check item ── */
    .check-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; padding: 4px 0; }
    .check-icon { color: var(--primary); margin-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .check-icon svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; }

    /* ── Process step ── */
    .step-num {
      width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light));
      color: #fff; font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .step-icon {
      width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      background: var(--primary-glow); color: var(--primary);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .step-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

    /* ── Industry pill ── */
    .industry-card {
      background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 18px 12px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
      text-align: center; gap: 10px;
      transition: border-color .2s, transform .2s;
    }
    .industry-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .industry-icon {
      width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      background: var(--primary-glow); color: var(--primary);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .industry-icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

    /* ── Stat card ── */
    .stat-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 44px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 8px; }

    /* ── Contact row ── */
    .contact-row {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 10px;
      transition: border-color .2s, background .2s;
    }
    .contact-row:hover { border-color: var(--border-hover); background: var(--bg-alt); }
    .contact-icon {
      width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      background: var(--primary-glow); color: var(--primary);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .contact-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

    /* ── Nav ── */
    nav.site-nav {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
      background: rgba(249,249,252,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .nav-inner {
      max-width: var(--max-w); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px;
      height: 60px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .nav-logo {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 17px; color: var(--text);
    }
    .nav-logo-mark {
      width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 9px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px;
    }
    .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; }
    .nav-links a { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); transition: color .15s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .nav-hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; }
    .nav-hamburger span { width: 22px; height: 2px; background: var(--text); border-radius: 2px; transition: all .25s; }
    .nav-mobile { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; background: var(--bg-card); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .nav-mobile a { padding: 14px 24px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-muted); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .nav-mobile a:hover { color: var(--text); background: var(--bg-alt); }
    .nav-mobile.open { display: flex; }

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 92vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      padding: 0;
    }
    /* Background image — fills the whole hero */
    .hero-bg-img {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    }
    .hero-bg-img img {
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover; object-position: center 30%;
      display: block;
    }
    /* Layered overlay: dark top-left for text legibility, lighter right */
    .hero-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1;
      background:
        linear-gradient(105deg,
          rgba(12,10,36,0.82) 0%,
          rgba(20,14,56,0.72) 40%,
          rgba(20,14,56,0.30) 70%,
          rgba(20,14,56,0.10) 100%
        ),
        linear-gradient(180deg,
          rgba(12,10,36,0.35) 0%,
          rgba(12,10,36,0.15) 100%
        );
    }
    /* Content sits above overlay */
    .hero-content {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      max-width: var(--max-w);
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 100px 24px 96px;
      max-width: 680px;
      width: 100%;
      margin-left: max(24px, calc((100vw - var(--max-w)) / 2));
    }
    .hero-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 16px;
      font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
      font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 24px;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    }
    .hero-badge-dot {
      width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: #f5a623; flex-shrink: 0;
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(245,166,35,0.7);
    }
    .hero-content h1 {
      font-size: clamp(34px, 5.5vw, 64px);
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.08;
      letter-spacing: -0.025em;
      color: #ffffff;
      margin: 0 0 20px;
    }
    .hero-gradient-text {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a78bfa, #7c5fe6, #60a5fa);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      background-clip: text;
      color: transparent;
    }
    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 17px;
      line-height: 1.75;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.78);
      max-width: 540px;
      margin: 0 0 32px;
    }
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }
    /* Hero-specific button overrides */
    .btn-hero-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c4cf1, #a78bfa);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 14px 26px;
      font-size: 15px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(108,76,241,0.45);
      border: none;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s, opacity .2s;
      cursor: pointer;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .btn-hero-primary:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(108,76,241,0.55);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    .btn-hero-outline {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 13px 24px;
      font-size: 15px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.30);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      font-weight: 600;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      transition: background .2s, border-color .2s, transform .2s;
      cursor: pointer;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .btn-hero-outline:hover {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
      border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.50);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .hero-trust {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;
    }
    .trust-chip {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px;
      font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.80);
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .trust-chip svg { color: #a78bfa; flex-shrink: 0; }

    /* ── Footer ── */
    /* ── Footer ── */
    footer {
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 28px 24px;
      font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-light);
    }
    .footer-inner {
      max-width: var(--max-w); margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px;
    }
    .footer-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .footer-logo-mark {
      width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 6px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px;
    }

    /* ── Responsive ── */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .section          { padding: 52px 0; }
      .nav-links        { display: none; }
      .nav-hamburger    { display: flex; }
      .nav-cta          { display: none; }
      .hero             { min-height: 100svh; }
      .hero-content     { padding: 80px 20px 72px; margin-left: 0; max-width: 100%; }
      .hero-sub         { font-size: 15px; }
      .hero-overlay     { background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(12,10,36,0.88) 0%, rgba(20,14,56,0.70) 60%, rgba(20,14,56,0.40) 100%); }
      .two-col          { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
      .stat-num         { font-size: 36px; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .container        { padding: 0 16px; }
      .grid-3           { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .grid-5           { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .grid-7           { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .hero-actions     { flex-direction: column; }
      .btn-hero-primary,
      .btn-hero-outline { justify-content: center; width: 100%; }
      .hero-content     { padding: 72px 16px 64px; }
    }

    /* ── Why Us enhanced ── */
    .why-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px,1fr)); gap: 48px; align-items: start; }
    .why-card {
      background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 24px 22px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
      transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
    }
    .why-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .why-icon-box {
      width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .why-icon-box svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }
    .why-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 6px; }
    .why-tag {
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 9px;
      border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bg-alt);
      color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .why-stat-row { display: flex; gap: 24px; margin-top: 28px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .why-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .why-stat-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; }
    .why-stat-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }

    /* ── Process track ── */
    .process-track {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: flex-start; gap: 0;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .process-step {
      flex: 1; min-width: 140px; max-width: 200px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
      text-align: center; padding: 0 8px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .process-icon-wrap {
      width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--icon-bg, #f0edfb);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
      color: var(--icon-color, var(--primary));
      flex-shrink: 0;
      transition: transform .2s;
    }
    .process-step:hover .process-icon-wrap { transform: scale(1.08); }
    .process-icon-wrap svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
    .process-step-num {
      position: absolute; top: 44px; right: calc(50% - 42px);
      width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light));
      color: #fff; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      border: 2px solid #fff;
    }
    .process-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .process-desc { font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .process-connector {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding-top: 20px; color: var(--border-hover); flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px;
    }
    .process-connector svg { width: 28px; height: 10px; }

    /* ── Benefit cards ── */
    .benefit-card {
      background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 28px 24px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
      transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
    }
    .benefit-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .benefit-icon-wrap {
      width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      background: var(--bc, #f0edfb);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 4px; flex-shrink: 0;
      color: var(--bic, var(--primary));
    }
    .benefit-icon-wrap svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
    .benefit-stat {
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 38px;
      font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;
    }
    .benefit-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; }
    .benefit-desc { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--text-muted); }

    /* ── Process responsive ── */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .process-track { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0; }
      .process-connector { transform: rotate(90deg); width: auto; padding: 4px 0; }
      .process-step { max-width: 340px; width: 100%; flex-direction: row; text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; padding: 14px 0; gap: 16px; }
      .process-icon-wrap { flex-shrink: 0; margin-bottom: 0; }
      .process-step-num { top: 44px; right: auto; left: 46px; }
      .process-step > div:last-child { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .why-layout { gap: 32px; }
    }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════
     INLINE SVG ZOHO PRODUCT LOGOS
     (reusable <symbol> defs — reference with <use>)
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:none">
  <!-- Generic SVG icons for process/industries -->
  <symbol id="icon-clipboard" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h2a2 2 0 0 0 2-2M9 5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2m-6 9l2 2 4-4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-layout" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/><line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="9" y1="21" x2="9" y2="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-code" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-test" viewBox="0 0 24 24">

<!-- ════════════════ PROCESS ════════════════ -->
<section id="process" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="label">Our Process</span>
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:48px;">From idea to impact in five steps</h2>
    <div class="process-track">

      <div class="process-step">
        <div class="process-icon-wrap" style="--icon-color:#0063D1;--icon-bg:#eef3ff;">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4"/><path d="M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="process-step-num">1</div>
        <h3 class="process-title">Business Requirement Analysis</h3>
        <p class="process-desc text-muted">We listen, map your workflows, and document every requirement before writing a line of code.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="process-connector" aria-hidden="true">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 8" fill="none"><path d="M0 4 H20 M16 1 L20 4 L16 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
      </div>

      <div class="process-step">
        <div class="process-icon-wrap" style="--icon-color:#6C4CF1;--icon-bg:#f5f0ff;">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/>
            <path d="M17.5 14v3h3M17.5 17h-3v3"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="process-step-num">2</div>
        <h3 class="process-title">Solution Architecture</h3>
        <p class="process-desc text-muted">We design the data model, module structure, and integration blueprint before any build starts.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="process-connector" aria-hidden="true">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 8" fill="none"><path d="M0 4 H20 M16 1 L20 4 L16 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
      </div>

      <div class="process-step">
        <div class="process-icon-wrap" style="--icon-color:#E8580C;--icon-bg:#fff2ec;">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/>
            <line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="22" stroke-opacity=".4"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="process-step-num">3</div>
        <h3 class="process-title">Development &amp; Integration</h3>
        <p class="process-desc text-muted">Custom Deluge scripting, API connections, and UI built precisely to your spec.</p>

<!-- ════════════════ JS: mobile nav ════════════════ -->
<script>
  var hamburger = document.getElementById('hamburger');
  var navMobile = document.getElementById('nav-mobile');
  hamburger.addEventListener('click', function() {
    navMobile.classList.toggle('open');
  });
  hamburger.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') navMobile.classList.toggle('open');
  });
  // Close mobile nav when a link is clicked
  navMobile.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function(a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function() { navMobile.classList.remove('open'); });
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
